message:
Use proper build directory for benchmark binaries

Industry standard: Compile binaries to .build/ directory.

Changes:
- bench_fibonacci.sh: Compile to benchmarks/.build/
- bench_startup.sh: Compile to benchmarks/.build/
- .gitignore: Ignore benchmarks/.build/ instead of individual files

Before: Binaries in benchmarks/ dir (polluted working tree)
After: Binaries in benchmarks/.build/ (clean, gitignored)

Standard practice used by:
- Zig: zig-out/bin/
- Cargo: target/release/
- Most projects: build/, .build/, bin/

files.patch:
@@ -81,16 +81,13 @@ test_pool
 test_glob
 test_string_builder
 
-# Benchmark binaries (should only be in benchmarks/ dir)
+# Benchmark binaries (compiled to benchmarks/.build/)
 /fibonacci
 /fibonacci_*
 /hello
 /hello_*
 /*.rmeta
-benchmarks/fibonacci_go
-benchmarks/fibonacci_rust
-benchmarks/hello_go
-benchmarks/hello_rust
+benchmarks/.build/
 
 # Debug/backup files
 repro_*.zig

@@ -4,23 +4,31 @@ set -e
 
 SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
 REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"
+BUILD_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/.build"
 
 echo "🚀 Fibonacci(45) Benchmark: 4-Language Comparison"
 echo "=================================================="
 echo "Computing fibonacci(45) = 1134903170"
 echo "Expected runtime: ~60s (CPython), ~5-7s (PyAOT), ~3-4s (Go), ~2-3s (Rust)"
 echo ""
 
-# Run hyperfine benchmark
+# Create build directory (gitignored)
+mkdir -p "$BUILD_DIR"
+
+# Compile Go and Rust to build directory
 cd "$SCRIPT_DIR"
+go build -o "$BUILD_DIR/fibonacci_go" fibonacci.go
+rustc -O fibonacci.rs -o "$BUILD_DIR/fibonacci_rust"
+
+# Run hyperfine benchmark
 hyperfine \
     --warmup 1 \
     --runs 3 \
     --export-markdown bench_fibonacci_results.md \
     --command-name "CPython 3.13" 'python3 fibonacci.py' \
     --command-name "PyAOT (Zig)" "cd $REPO_ROOT && pyaot benchmarks/fibonacci.py" \
-    --command-name "Go 1.25" './fibonacci_go' \
-    --command-name "Rust 1.91" './fibonacci_rust'
+    --command-name "Go 1.25" "$BUILD_DIR/fibonacci_go" \
+    --command-name "Rust 1.91" "$BUILD_DIR/fibonacci_rust"
 
 echo ""
 echo "📊 Results saved to bench_fibonacci_results.md"

@@ -2,29 +2,39 @@
 # Startup time benchmark: 4-Language comparison (Hello World)
 set -e
 
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+BUILD_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/.build"
+
 echo "⚡ Startup Time Benchmark: 4-Language Comparison"
 echo "================================================="
 echo "Measuring pure startup overhead (Hello World)"
 echo ""
 
+# Create build directory (gitignored)
+mkdir -p "$BUILD_DIR"
+
 # Pre-compile PyAOT binary
 if [ ! -f ../.pyaot/hello ]; then
     echo "Compiling PyAOT binary..."
     cd ..
     pyaot build benchmarks/hello.py --binary
-    cd benchmarks
+    cd "$SCRIPT_DIR"
     echo ""
 fi
 
+# Compile Go and Rust to build directory
+go build -o "$BUILD_DIR/hello_go" hello.go
+rustc -O hello.rs -o "$BUILD_DIR/hello_rust"
+
 # Run hyperfine benchmark
 hyperfine \
     --warmup 10 \
     --runs 100 \
     --shell=none \
     --export-markdown bench_startup_results.md \
     --command-name "PyAOT (Zig)" '../.pyaot/hello' \
-    --command-name "Rust 1.91" './hello_rust' \
-    --command-name "Go 1.25" './hello_go' \
+    --command-name "Rust 1.91" "$BUILD_DIR/hello_rust" \
+    --command-name "Go 1.25" "$BUILD_DIR/hello_go" \
     --command-name "CPython 3.13" 'python3 hello.py'
 
 echo ""
